'''âw-v-f-z''' ('''kawavfezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foreclaim|foreclaim]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foreclaim|foreclaim]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-v-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| kawavfezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavfezoko|thiwavfezoko]] || [[word:jiwavfezoko|jiwavfezoko]] || [[word:shiwavfezoko|shiwavfezoko]] || [[word:kiwavfezoko|kiwavfezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavfezoko|thuthuwavfezoko]] || [[word:jujuwavfezoko|jujuwavfezoko]] || [[word:shushuwavfezoko|shushuwavfezoko]] || [[word:kukuwavfezoko|kukuwavfezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
